final:
// // This module implements a 2-to-1 multiplexer where the output y is selected from inputs a or b based on the sel signal.
module top_module(output reg y, input a, b, sel);always @ (a, b, sel) if (sel ==1) y = b; else y = a;endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 2-to-1 multiplexer where the output y is selected from inputs a or b based on the sel signal.
